"vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:A/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 8.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:A/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-295", "name": "Improper Certificate Validation"}], "description": "### Impact
An attacker on the network path between the ePA service and the Konnektor can present any TLS certificate (self-signed, expired, wrong CN) and intercept all SOAP traffic. This includes patient identifiers (KVNR), SMC-B card operations (authentication, signing),
document content, and credential exchanges.

### Patches
[#36](https://github.com/oviva-ag/epa4all-client/pull/36)

### Workarounds
Use the library directly instead of the REST wrapper.

### Resources
- MS-OVIVA-EPA4ALL-771a78

### Credits
[Machine Spirits](https://machinespirits.com/) ([contact@machinespirits.de](mailto:contact@machinespirits.de))

- Dr. rer. nat. Simon Weber
- Dipl.-Inf. Volker Schönefeld
- Chiara Fliegner", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00138, "percentile": 0.0352}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-5hhf-xmfx-4vvr", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-15T18:29:31Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-5hhf-xmfx-4vvr", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-5hhf-xmfx-4vvr"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-45574"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-26T22:16:43Z", "published_at": "2026-05-15T18:29:31Z", "references": ["https://github.com/oviva-ag/epa4all-client/security/advisories/GHSA-5hhf-xmfx-4vvr", "https://github.com/oviva-ag/epa4all-client/pull/36", "https://github.com/oviva-ag/epa4all-client/commit/9111d6fbb939007036a7f74b2a93bb278cb5af32", "https://github.com/oviva-ag/epa4all-client/releases/tag/v1.2.2", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-45574", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-5hhf-xmfx-4vvr"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/oviva-ag/epa4all-client/security-advisories/GHSA-5hhf-xmfx-4vvr", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/oviva-ag/epa4all-client", "summary": "epa4all-client: TLS Certificate Validation Disabled in Production", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-08T23:35:20Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-5hhf-xmfx-4vvr", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.2.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "com.oviva.telematik:epa4all-client"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.2.2"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: epa4all-client: TLS Certificate Validation Disabled in Production
